productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Pluto Black Sports Shoes
description: Take adventure Sports to the next level with adidas Pluto shoes. These comfortable trainers are designed to offer optimum comfort without compromising on style. UpperMesh upper with strategically placed synthetic overlays for better breathability and structureLace-ups for a snug, customised Fitadidas patented 3-Stripes on the sides of the midfootHard extrenal heel cup and padded on the inside for maximum backfoot supportPadded collar and tongue with textile shoe lining for all-day breathable comfortMidsoleCushioned footbed for all-day comfortPhylon midsole for better shock absorption and cushioningRemovable footbed to accommodate an orthoticOutsoleTPR outsole with modified herringbone pattern lugs and grooves for absolute grip and tractionWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
